methodology: Static code review + route inventory; not a substitute for authenticated DAST in staging/production.

findings.title: Freemium grade returns correctKeys after answer submission
findings.detail: POST /api/questions/freemium-grade returns normalized correct keys for grading feedback. Requires signed-in user + freemium quota; intentional for free-tier UX, not a subscription bypass.

findings.title: Public marketing lesson HTML is visible for structurally complete lessons
findings.detail: Published pathway lessons with publicComplete true render article body to all visitors; premium depth may still be gated in UI via canViewFullPathwayLesson for subscriber-only sections — verify product intent per pathway.

findings.title: Heuristic scan flags some routes for manual review
findings.detail: Files without obvious requireSubscriberSession/auth in first-pass regex (2): review for non-educational public responses only.
